examples: Most expect to make good money and burnish their curricula vitae.
Taedium vitae, said my daughter, or at least that's what I thought I heard her say.
However, if you are a very experienced professional writing a curriculum vitae, it can be 2 to 3 pages.
Indeed the obvious omission from his curriculum vitae is time spent getting his hands dirty at the laboratory bench.
To pass the time, he planned to hunt for jobs online, update his curriculum vitae and freshen up his social profile.
